limitations: This registry is heuristic and productized for guided navigation. It does not replace reviewer-verified exact member mapping.
Canonical MIDAS 33 geometry is beam-family-only, so wall/brace/column semantic ids are bridged to representative surrogate beam/vertical geometry.
These rows are manually reviewed exact focus-member mappings for navigation inside the canonical MIDAS 33 artifact.
They do not claim exhaustive one-to-many physical member equivalence for every code-check row.
